PowerShell($urls = @\('https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/12320953-L.jpg','https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/7222246-L.jpg','https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/isbn/9788172953058-L.jpg','https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/10527183-L.jpg','https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/isbn/9788172952662-L.jpg'\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Host "$\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Headers.'Content-Length'\) bytes - $u" } catch { Write-Host "FAIL $\($_.Exception.Message.Substring\(0,50\)\) - $u" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.googleapis.com/books/v1/volumes?q=intitle:1984+inauthor:orwell&maxResults=1" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "OK:" $j.items[0].volumeInfo.imageLinks.thumbnail } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: googleapis unreachable" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 100; cd "C:\\Users\\avishek.n\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-avishek-n-Desktop-Littgeram-books-littgram-react-littgram-react\\e0326ffc-7e5d-4613-b083-2e88269ccbe3\\scratchpad"; $b64 = [Convert]::ToBase64String\([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("test-page.jpg"\)\); $body = @{ images = @\($b64\); lang = "hi-IN" } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://littgram.vercel.app/api/gemini-ocr" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\) | MODEL: $\($j.model\) | CHARS: $\($j.text.Length\)"; Write-Host $j.text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, $j.text.Length\)\))

PowerShell($scratch = "C:\\Users\\avishek.n\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-avishek-n-Desktop-Littgeram-books-littgram-react-littgram-react\\e0326ffc-7e5d-4613-b083-2e88269ccbe3\\scratchpad"; $b64 = [Convert]::ToBase64String\([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("$scratch\\test-page.jpg"\)\); $body = @{ images = @\($b64\); lang = "hi-IN" } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://littgram.vercel.app/api/gemini-ocr" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\) | CHARS: $\($j.text.Length\)"; Write-Host $j.text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(250, $j.text.Length\)\))

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 60; $scratch = "C:\\Users\\avishek.n\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-avishek-n-Desktop-Littgeram-books-littgram-react-littgram-react\\e0326ffc-7e5d-4613-b083-2e88269ccbe3\\scratchpad"; $b64 = [Convert]::ToBase64String\([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("$scratch\\test-page.jpg"\)\); $body = @{ images = @\($b64\); lang = "hi-IN" } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://littgram.vercel.app/api/gemini-ocr" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\) | CHARS: $\($j.text.Length\)"; Write-Host $j.text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(250, $j.text.Length\)\) } catch { Write-Host "FAILED:"; Write-Host $_.ErrorDetails.Message })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\avishek.n\\Desktop\\Littgeram books\\littgram-react\\littgram-react"; $covers = Select-String -Path "src\\data\\books.js" -Pattern "cover:'\([^']+\)'" -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches } | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value } | Sort-Object -Unique; Write-Host "$\($covers.Count\) unique cover URLs"; $covers | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\avishek.n\\Desktop\\Littgeram books\\littgram-react\\littgram-react"; $covers = Select-String -Path "src\\data\\books.js" -Pattern "cover:'\([^']+\)'" -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches } | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value } | Sort-Object -Unique; $ok=0; $bad=0; $badList=@\(\); foreach \($u in $covers\) { $proxied = "https://littgram.vercel.app/api/cover?u=" + [uri]::EscapeDataString\($u\); try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $proxied -Method Get -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 25; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200 -and $r.RawContentLength -gt 1500\) { $ok++ } else { $bad++; $badList += $u } } catch { $bad++; $badList += $u } }; Write-Host "OK: $ok | BROKEN: $bad"; Write-Host "--- broken ---"; $badList)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force -File | Where-Object Name -match '^\\.env|serviceAccount|firebase-admin' | Select-Object Name; node --version)

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(25\); $ok = $false; while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:5173 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2 -ErrorAction Stop; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok = $true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; "server up: $ok")

PowerShell($mask = 'mask.fieldPaths=seeded&mask.fieldPaths=title&mask.fieldPaths=native&mask.fieldPaths=author&mask.fieldPaths=lang&mask.fieldPaths=bytes&mask.fieldPaths=seededAt&mask.fieldPaths=storedAt'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://firestore.googleapis.com/v1/projects/littgram-54427/databases/\(default\)/documents/books?pageSize=300&$mask" -TimeoutSec 20; $r.documents | ForEach-Object { $f=$_.fields; [PSCustomObject]@{ id=\($_.name -split '/'\)[-1]; seeded=$f.seeded.booleanValue; title=$f.title.stringValue; author=$f.author.stringValue; lang=$f.lang.stringValue; bytes=$f.bytes.integerValue; seededAt=$f.seededAt.integerValue; storedAt=$f.storedAt.integerValue } } | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(git status --porcelain; git diff --stat; Write-Host '--- sizes:'; "{0:N1} MB  book-sources/texts" -f \(\(Get-ChildItem 'book-sources\\texts' -Recurse | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1MB\); "{0:N1} KB  scripts" -f \(\(Get-ChildItem 'scripts' -Recurse | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1KB\); Write-Host '--- gitignore:'; Get-Content .gitignore)

PowerShell(git ls-files public/texts | Select-Object -First 3; Write-Host '---'; if \(Test-Path public\\texts\) { "{0:N1} MB public/texts \({1} files\)" -f \(\(Get-ChildItem public\\texts | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1MB\), \(Get-ChildItem public\\texts\).Count } else { 'no public/texts' }; Write-Host '--- scripts:'; Get-ChildItem scripts | Select-Object Name; Write-Host '--- book-sources tracked:'; git ls-files book-sources | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell($urls = node "C:\\Users\\avishek.n\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-avishek-n-Desktop-Littgeram-books-littgram-react-littgram-react\\fefbfb92-1fe5-46a7-889a-ed2f9a58eaff\\scratchpad\\bot-urls.mjs"; $i=0; foreach \($u in $urls\) { $i++; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 180 -ErrorAction Stop; "img $i : $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Headers.'Content-Type'\) $\([math]::Round\($r.RawContentLength/1KB\)\)KB" } catch { "img $i : FAILED $\($_.Exception.Message.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(90, $_.Exception.Message.Length\)\)\)" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5 })
